allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Databases: {len\(d[""databases""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {db[""name""]}: {len\(db[""stations""]\)} stations, first={db[""stations""][0][""name""]}''''\) for db in d[''''databases'''']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Showing: {len\(d[""databases""]\)} databases''''\); [print\(f''''  {db[""name""]}''''\) for db in d[''''databases'''']]")
